name: Calendar View - Multiday
description: Improve rendering of events spanning on multiple days.
notes: Submodule of calendar_view (part_of). Zero configuration: it only attaches the `calendar_view_multiday/multiday` asset library and adds `data-calendar-view-instance(s)` attributes plus `is-multi`/`is-multi--first`/`is-multi--middle`/`is-multi--last` CSS classes to rendered results in each day cell, via preprocess hooks on `views_view_calendar` and `calendar_view_day`. This lets an event that spans several days (e.g. a `daterange` field) be styled as one continuous bar across cells. Enable it and it works — no settings, no config entity. Documented lightly; see the parent module for calendar setup.
